exhibits.name: List of Franchised Hotels as of December 31, 2024
exhibits.notes: 34 franchised hotels across 24 states. All converted from Project Alpha by Hilton in May 2024. Includes entity name, city, state, address.

exhibits.name: List of Franchised Hotels Terminated, Canceled, Not Renewed or with Changes in Controlling Interest during 2024
exhibits.notes: No terminations, cancellations, non-renewals, or changes in controlling interest during 2024 (brand was new).

exhibits.name: Financial Statements
exhibits.notes: Audited consolidated financial statements of Hilton Franchise Holding LLC (covers ALL Hilton brands). Includes balance sheets (2024/2023), income statements (2024/2023/2022), cash flows (2024/2023/2022), and 9 notes. Auditor: Cherry Bekaert LLP. Clean opinion.

exhibits.name: Franchise Agreement and Addendum
exhibits.notes: Sample Franchise Agreement. Not for signature. Terms may vary significantly by state and transaction.

exhibits.name: State Addenda to Franchise Agreement
exhibits.notes: State-specific modifications to the Franchise Agreement.

exhibits.name: Development Incentive Promissory Note
exhibits.notes: Form of development incentive note (contingent liability, not a loan).

exhibits.name: Information Technology System Agreement (HITS Agreement)
exhibits.notes: Governs access to and use of OnQ/HPMS and Reservation Service. Countersigned by HSS.

exhibits.name: Manual Table of Contents — Brand Standards
exhibits.notes: Table of contents of the confidential Brand Standards Manual.

exhibits.name: State Administrators and Agents for Service of Process
exhibits.notes: List of state franchise regulators and designated agents for service.

exhibits.name: State Addenda to Disclosure Document
exhibits.notes: State-specific amendments to the FDD. Includes addenda for Hawaii, Illinois, Maryland, and other states. Material overrides: IL governing law protection, MD termination/renewal law supremacy, MN general protections.

exhibits.name: Restaurant Brands Addendum to Disclosure Document
exhibits.notes: Describes StiR Creative Collective restaurant brand concepts available to certain Hilton brands.

exhibits.name: Lender Comfort Letter Forms
exhibits.notes: Sample forms for lender comfort letters and assignments.

exhibits.name: State Effective Dates
exhibits.notes: Effective dates of FDD registration by state.

exhibits.name: Receipts
exhibits.notes: Two copies of detachable receipt for prospective franchisee acknowledgment.
